content:
守密人你好：
       彌薩格大學校務處將於4月7日21:50進行校內設施修復，更新完成後您將得到通知，重新進入遊戲。對於更新可能給大家帶來的不便，我們會準備一份補給物資以示歉意。祝大家調查順利！ 
  
【補給物資】
在線維護補償：銀芯*50
  
【領取條件】
領取時間截至2025年4月21日23:59。請記得及時前往郵箱領取補給物資哦。  
 
【更新內容】
一、戰鬥
● 超維空間：超維回合造成的傷害、護盾、生命回復等效果降低幅度由 50% 調整為 25%。若當前為至純超維，則仍然不受效果降低的影響。
——米酒：自星辰篇以來，我們在持續觀察環境的多樣性，並對一些喚醒體補充靈塑適性或是放松星辰篇機製。目前我們意識到超維回合的各類效果減半對於混編超維界域帶來的打擊有點太大了，甚至會僅依靠「湮滅」來獲取靈感，放棄「超維空間」這個選項。因此我們決定調整這部分的比例來讓「超維空間」在混編中仍然能有一定的吸引力。
 
二、優化和問題修復
● 修復了「維度影像·克萊門汀」不會從「灰燼遺跡」中出現的問題。
● 修復了「相位對弈」彌利亞姆「湮滅預言」造成傷害後的出血會額外受到一次強效等增幅收益問題，該出血效果應為固定值且不受增減傷影響。
● 修復了「相位對弈」中「幻影」卡牌打出後「虛無」特效丟失問題。
● 修復了「相位對弈」中命輪「催眠靈擺」戰鬥內描述錯誤的問題。
● 修復了拉蒙娜在派遣中時，「環形拉蒙娜」養成回溯提示【用戶端傳入資料錯誤】的問題。
● 修復了常駐的往期限定角色、命輪【限定】標記丟失的問題。
● 修復了在共鳴節點「生命的蛻變」處，選擇狂氣已滿的喚醒體轉化為「蟲族」時錯誤的彈出確認提示的問題。
● 優化了星辰篇詛咒造物「翠玉拓印」的描述，實際效果不變。
● 優化了遊戲界面內部分英文藝術裝飾字體的表現效果。

V2.2.0.1 Online Maintenance Notice

Dear Keeper,
    The Mythag University Administration Office will conduct facility repairs on April 7 at 21:50(UTC+8). You will be notified once the update is complete and can re-enter the game. We apologize for any inconvenience this may cause and will provide a supply package as compensation. Happy investigating!
    
【Supply Package】
Maintenance Compensation: Silver*50
    
【Claim Conditions】
Claim period ends on April 21 2025(UTC+8), at 23:59. Please remember to check your mailbox to claim the supply package.
     
【Update Content】
（Due to an abnormality in our AI translator, except for the Chinese version, the parts related to text adjustments in the announcement content have not been implemented in the client. Please refer to the announcement content for accuracy. We will fix this description issue in the next update.)

1.Combat
● Transdimensional Space: The reduction in effects such as damage, shield, and health recovery during Transdimensional Turns has been adjusted from 50% to 25%. If currently in Pure Transdimensional, these effects remain unaffected by the reduction.
——Mijiu: Since the Star Chapter, we have been continuously observing the diversity of the environment and supplementing the adaptability of some awakened entities or relaxing the mechanisms of the Star Chapter. We realized that halving the effects during Transdimensional Turns was too detrimental to mixed Transdimensional realms, leading players to rely solely on "Annihilation" for inspiration and abandon the "Transdimensional Space" option. Therefore, we decided to adjust this ratio to ensure "Transdimensional Space" remains appealing in mixed compositions.

2.Optimization and Bug Fixes
● Fixed: The issue where "Dimensional Image: Clementine" would not appear in "Ashen Ruins."
● Fixed: In "Phase Chess," the issue where Miriam's "Annihilation Prophecy" caused bleeding to receive additional amplification benefits. The bleeding effect should be a fixed value and not affected by damage increase or reduction.
● Fixed: The issue in "Phase Chess" where the "Void" effect was lost after playing the "Phantom" card.
● Fixed: The incorrect description of the "Hypnotic Pendulum" fate wheel during combat in "Phase Chess."
● Fixed: The issue where Ramona, when dispatched, showed an incorrect prompt [Client Data Error] during the development regression of "Circular Ramona."
● Fixed: The missing [Limited] tag for permanent past limited characters and fate wheels.
● Fixed: The incorrect confirmation prompt when converting an awakened entity with full madness into "Zerg" at the resonance node "Life's Metamorphosis."
● Optimized: The description of the Star Chapter's cursed creation "Jade Engraving," with no change to its actual effect.
● Optimized: The performance of certain English artistic decorative fonts within the game interface.

Happy to see the change to the ultra roud to help mixing whit ultra, but hopping to see some buff or changes to Clementine in future updates to help her find a good place in the meta and incentivize ultra mixing.

personally I just wish she had unique leap/quasar effects, instead of Gain 20 Str on every skill. 

e.g. 'Quasar: Gain x empathy', 'Quasar: annihilation does not remove a card from the ultra space this turn', 'Quasar: Gain x arith next turn', etc.
There are a lot of things that can be adjusted, if they do it now that she is still out it will be best.
